The question is asking how many competitors had more than 100 points in the "total" column. To determine this, we can first sort the "total" column using the f_sort_column(total) operation with the order "large to small" to easily identify which drivers have totals above 100. The question is asking to count how many competitors have a total score greater than 100. Since each row represents a driver and their total points, we can filter the "total" column to find entries with values above 100. We can use the f_filter_column(total > 100) operation to identify and count these competitors.
